product_page.page_title: 100% Cotton Vat Dyed Pique Fabric - ArShirt - Ariteks
description_blocks: 220 g/m², 100% Cotton, Pique, Vat Dyed Knit Fabric %100 cotton pique workwear knit fabric with very high chlorinated bleaching and light fastness.
ArShirt fabric are produced from the best quality combed yarn Turkish Cotton.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7.
ArShirt fabrics can be bleached with peroxide and hypochloride without whitening in color.
Vat dyed ArShirt products can be used in the most hard working conditions and in military and workwear area.

technical_documents.label: >> ArShirt Data Sheet
technical_documents.context_text: Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Cotton (CO) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 20/1 Ne Combed EN ISO 2060 Weight 220 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1800 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1000 kPa(kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 6-7 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 4-5 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Workwear Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Uv Protection Done EN 13758 Technical Documents >> ArShirt Data Sheet Certificates ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 B02 ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 C06 ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 D01 ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 E04 ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 X11 ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 X12

Vat dyed ArShirt products can be used in the most hard working conditions and in military and workwear area.

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
220 g/m² , 100% Cotton, Pique, Vat Dyed Knit Fabric

%100 cotton pique workwear knit fabric with very high chlorinated bleaching and light fastness. ArShirt fabric are produced from the best quality combed yarn Turkish Cotton. It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7. ArShirt fabrics can be bleached with peroxide and hypochloride without whitening in color. Vat dyed ArShirt products can be used in the most hard working conditions and in military and workwear area. Technical Parameters Fiber 100% Cotton (CO) EN ISO 2076 Yarn 20/1 Ne Combed EN ISO 2060 Weight 220 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1800 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Bursting strength > 1000 kPa(kN/m² ) EN ISO 13938-1 Dimensional Change -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 6-7 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 4-5 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Workwear Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Uv Protection Done EN 13758 Technical Documents >> ArShirt Data Sheet Certificates ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 B02 ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 C06 ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 D01 ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 E04 ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 X11 ArShirt-3938, ISO 105 X12

100% Cotton Vat Dyed Pique Fabric - ArShirt - Ariteks
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
Protection Technical Textiles
ArShirt
220 gr/m
2
, 100% Cotton, Pique, Vat Dyed Knit Fabric
%100 cotton pique workwear knit fabric with very high chlorinated bleaching and light fastness.
ArShirt fabric are produced from the best quality combed yarn Turkish Cotton.
It is resistant to very high sun level, with fastness level of 6 to 7.
ArShirt fabrics can be bleached with peroxide and hypochloride without whitening in color.
Vat dyed ArShirt products can be used in the most hard working conditions and in military and workwear area.
